templates.name: Instagram Download Button
templates.description: Adds download and open buttons to Instagram posts, stories, reels, highlights, and profile pictures. Supports downloading both photos and videos directly from any Instagram content.
templates.author: Browser Automata

scripts.name: Instagram Download Button
scripts.description: Injects download and open buttons on Instagram posts, stories, reels, highlights, and profile pictures. Handles both photos and videos with SPA-aware re-processing.
